title: ilex laevigata var. herveyi
intro: Ilex laevigata var. herveyi, also known as the Hervey's Holly or the Queensland Native Holly, is a variety of evergreen holly native to Australia, characterized by its dark green leaves and red berries. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ilex laevigata var. herveyi include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
